device_name: EFAI NeuroSuite CT ICH Assessment System
intended_use: EFAI ICHCT is a software workflow tool designed to aid in prioritizing the clinical assessment of adult non-contrast head CT cases with features suggestive of acute intracranial hemorrhage (ICH). EFAI
intended_use_full: EFAI ICHCT is a software workflow tool designed to aid in prioritizing the clinical assessment of adult non-contrast head CT cases with features suggestive of acute intracranial hemorrhage (ICH). EFAI ICHCT analyzes cases using deep learning algorithms to identify suspected ICH findings. It makes case-level output available to a PACS/workstation for worklist prioritization or triage.
ground_truth: Reference standard (ground truth) generated by majority agreement between three independent U.S. board-certified neuroradiologists
